# Method: layer()

```ts
layer(source): this;
```

Layer another source on top.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `source` | [`SynthParameterValue`](../../../type-aliases/SynthParameterValue.md) | Source to layer |

## Returns

`this`
